features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Anti-perspirant deodorant: NIVEA Cool Kick anti-perspirant deodorant spray for men instantly protects you from the effects of sweat and body odour
Cool Kick: For a kick of freshness and long lasting protection: cool-care formula revives your body and regulates perspiration with an invigorating fragrance
48h protection: The 48 hour deodorant men can rely on. Cool-Kick NIVEA spray for men protects you from bad odours and sweat throughout the day
How to apply: Hold antiperspirant deodorant for men 15cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before dressing
Scope of delivery: NIVEA MEN Cool Kick Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Spray, 250ml Aerosol Can, 0% ethyl alcohol, Article Number: 82885
description: Product Description " NIVEA MEN Cool Kick Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Spray - For a kick of freshness and long-lasting protection NIVEA MEN Cool Kick Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Spray for men offers a cooling formula with mint extracts, providing instant freshness and anti-perspirant protection against sweat as well as a deodorising formula to eliminate body odour. NIVEA MEN mild Cool-Care formula revives your body and regulates perspiration, leaving you with a fresh and energised feeling all day. The anti-perspirant and deodorising effects give 48-hour protection, combined with a light and fresh scent that invigorates the senses. Specially designed for active men, NIVEA's Anti-Perspirant Spray is the 48 hour deodorant men need. It protects and cares for your skin during sport and intense training sessions and provides a kick of freshness to keep you energised for the rest of the day. As with other NIVEA men's deodorant sprays, the inclusion of NIVEA MEN Care Complex means the spray is kind to your skin whilst offering great protection from sweat and body odour.  Directions: Apply in the morning or after showering. Shake well before use and then hold the can 15cm from the underarm and spray. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Allow product to dry completely before dressing.  Product benefits Anti-Perspirant  Deodorant  Invigorating Fragrance   Cool-Care Formula 0% Ethyl Alcohol " Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Palmitate, Persea Gratissima Oil, Octyldodecanol, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Dimethicone, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Coumarin, Geraniol, Parfum Directions Shake well before use, hold 15cm from underarm and spray. Allow to dry before dressing. Safety Warning Pressurised container: protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degree c. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Do not spray on a naked flame or any incandescent material. Do not spray in the eyes. Keep away from sources of ignition - no smoking. Keep out of the reach of children. Avoid direct inhalation. Use only as directed. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Solvent abuse can kill instantly. See more
